approach: fix parseFrontmatter to detect top-level user-invocable:false

why: Cold SDD spec-judge 3-lens {oracle,builder,architect} over config-authoring/improve-skill — all PASS, ALIGNED, no open markers. Marker set validated 0-FP on all 43 shipped internal skills + 10 pre-sweep drift caught (build-to-learn spike). Builder coverage gap (metadata.internal OR-arm untested; public Q1 positive control missing) fixed pre-freeze and re-confirmed PASS. Oracle non-goal boundary line + marker Scenario Outline adopted pre-freeze.
